title: × aroniaria alpina
intro: × Aroniaria alpina, also known as the Alpine Aronia, is a deciduous shrub native to mountainous regions in Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its berries, which contain anthocyanins and other polyphenolic compounds that exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits associated with the Alpine Aronia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Alpine Aronia is often prepared as a tea, juice, or tincture, and its berries can also be consumed raw or used in jams and preserves.
